messages.content: import re def replace_images(s): """按照优先级替换图片标记""" urls = [] # 使用一个复杂的正则表达式匹配所有情况 # 这个pattern会匹配整个图片标记，包括可能的换行 # 修改正则表达式以处理所有情况 pattern = re.compile(r'!\[\]\((/[^)]+\.jpg)\)(\s*\n\n|\s*\n|(?=\s|$|\S))') def repl(m): # m.group(1) 是图片URL # m.group(2) 是后面的空白和换行部分 urls.append(m.group(1)) return "\n" # 一次性替换所有 result = pattern.sub(repl, s) return result, urls pattern_check = re.compile(r'!\[\]\((/[^)]+\.jpg)\)') # 单元测试 def test_replace_images(): """测试函数""" # 测试用例1: 包含所有三种情况的字符串 test_s1 = """这是一张图片![](/image1.jpg)\n\n这是另一张图片![](/image2.jpg) \n\n![](/image3.jpg)这是一行中的图片![](/image4.jpg) \n接着文字\n还有一张![](/image5.jpg) \n最后一张![](/image6.jpg)""" expected1 = """这是一张图片\n这是另一张图片\n\n这是一行中的图片\n接着文字\n还有一张\n最后一张\n""" result1, urls1 = replace_images(test_s1) assert result1 == expected1, f"测试1失败: \n期望: {expected1}\n实际: {result1}" assert urls1 == ['/image1.jpg', '/image2.jpg', '/image3.jpg', '/image4.jpg', '/image5.jpg', '/image6.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls1}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s1)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result1)) print(f"\n验证测试1: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试{i}验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试用例2: 双换行结尾的特殊情况 test_s2 = """![](/test1.jpg)\n\n普通文本 \n\n![](/test2.jpg) \n单换行文本\n![](/test3.jpg)""" result2, urls2 = replace_images(test_s2) expected2 = """\n普通文本 \n\n\n单换行文本\n\n""" assert result2 == expected2, f"测试2失败: \n期望: {expected2}\n实际: {result2}" assert urls2 == ['/test1.jpg', '/test2.jpg', '/test3.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls2}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s2)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result2)) print(f"\n验证测试2: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试{i}验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试用例3: 复杂换行情况 test_s3 = """开始\n![](/img1.jpg)\n\n![](/img2.jpg)\n\n中间文字![](/img3.jpg)\n\n![](/img4.jpg) \n结尾""" result3, urls3 = replace_images(test_s3) expected3 = """开始\n\n\n中间文字\n\n结尾""" assert result3 == expected3, f"测试3失败: \n期望: {expected3}\n实际: {result3}" assert urls3 == ['/img1.jpg', '/img2.jpg', '/img3.jpg', '/img4.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls3}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s3)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result3)) print(f"\n验证测试3: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试{i}验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试用例4: 空的或不包含图片的情况 test_s4 = "没有图片的文本" result4, urls4 = replace_images(test_s4) assert result4 == test_s4, "测试4失败: 空图片测试" assert urls4 == [], "测试4失败: URL列表应该为空" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s4)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result4)) print(f"\n验证测试4: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试{i}验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试用例5: 图片后跟空格的情况 test_s5 = """图片1![](/pic1.jpg) 后面有空格\n图片2![](/pic2.jpg) 多个空格\n图片3![](/pic3.jpg)\t制表符""" result5, urls5 = replace_images(test_s5) expected5 = """图片1\n 后面有空格\n图片2\n 多个空格\n图片3\n\t制表符""" assert result5 == expected5, f"测试5失败: \n期望: {expected5}\n实际: {result5}" assert urls5 == ['/pic1.jpg', '/pic2.jpg', '/pic3.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls5}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s5)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result5)) print(f"\n验证测试5: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试{i}验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试6: 实际pdf mock test_s6 = """![](/d973b4c837af5a6bfb1445d7dc299f4f691d79dcf8bd497a22f0589dd3396d19.jpg)\n\n![](/c1eecb2872e2cdcb2d8e7fdbf4388baf00d968e7a02b6b6239604c907e01831c.jpg) \nFIGURE 4. Polarized transport of $![](/19149aadfc9d9722c8bd361c84271174f45213ec964a12941b6571b565cbdd3b.jpg) \nFig 4. RR of new-onset LBP ts (figures, tables) or in its entirety can be found online at: http://www.aappublications.org/site/misc/Permissions.xhtmlReprintsInformation about ordering reprints can be found online: http://www.aappublications.org/site/misc/reprints.xhtml\n\nAmerican Academy of Pediatrics\n\nDEDICATED TO THE HEALTH OF ALL CHILDREN\n\n![](/ae3bd9e4f876b4be80d072f19a18c1b882ce90eba491879da7df5399099fdc75.jpg)""" result6, urls6 = replace_images(test_s6) expected6 = """\n\nFIGURE 4. Polarized transport of $\nFig 4. RR of new-onset LBP ts (figures, tables) or in its entirety can be found online at: http://www.aappublications.org/site/misc/Permissions.xhtmlReprintsInformation about ordering reprints can be found online: http://www.aappublications.org/site/misc/reprints.xhtml\n\nAmerican Academy of Pediatrics\n\nDEDICATED TO THE HEALTH OF ALL CHILDREN\n\n\n""" assert result6 == expected6, f"测试6失败: \n期望: {expected6}\n实际: {result6}" assert urls6 == ['/d973b4c837af5a6bfb1445d7dc299f4f691d79dcf8bd497a22f0589dd3396d19.jpg', '/c1eecb2872e2cdcb2d8e7fdbf4388baf00d968e7a02b6b6239604c907e01831c.jpg', '/19149aadfc9d9722c8bd361c84271174f45213ec964a12941b6571b565cbdd3b.jpg', '/ae3bd9e4f876b4be80d072f19a18c1b882ce90eba491879da7df5399099fdc75.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls6}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s6)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result6)) print(f"\n验证测试6: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试{i}验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" print("所有测试通过!") # 运行测试 if **name** == "__main__": test_replace_images() # 示例使用 s = """这是一些文本![](/example1.jpg)\n\n这是第二行\n![](/example3.jpg)\n\n单换行图片![](/example2.jpg)\n最后一张![](/example4.jpg)在行内""" result, urls = replace_images(s) print("\n示例输入:") print(repr(s)) print("\n替换结果:") print(repr(result)) print("\n提取的URL列表:") print(urls) 加一个逻辑， if url.split("/")[-1] in rdd_files_dict: if rdd_files_dict[url.split("/")[-1]] in set(["icon", "cover"]): continue 跳过满足该条件的url，直接丢掉，\n不需要对应

```python import re def replace_images(s, rdd_files_dict=None): """按照优先级替换图片标记 Args: s: 输入字符串 rdd_files_dict: 字典，key为文件名，value为文件类型。如果类型为"icon"或"cover"，则跳过该图片 """ if rdd_files_dict is None: rdd_files_dict = {} urls = [] # 使用一个复杂的正则表达式匹配所有情况 # 这个pattern会匹配整个图片标记，包括可能的换行 # 修改正则表达式以处理所有情况 pattern = re.compile(r'!\[\]\((/[^)]+\.jpg)\)(\s*\n\n|\s*\n|(?=\s|$|\S))') def repl(m): # m.group(1) 是图片URL # m.group(2) 是后面的空白和换行部分 url = m.group(1) filename = url.split("/")[-1] # 检查是否需要跳过该图片 if filename in rdd_files_dict: if rdd_files_dict[filename] in ["icon", "cover"]: # 跳过该图片，不添加到urls，也不替换为 return "" urls.append(url) return "\n" # 一次性替换所有 result = pattern.sub(repl, s) return result, urls pattern_check = re.compile(r'!\[\]\((/[^)]+\.jpg)\)') # 单元测试 def test_replace_images(): """测试函数""" # 测试用例1: 包含所有三种情况的字符串 test_s1 = """这是一张图片![](/image1.jpg)\n\n这是另一张图片![](/image2.jpg) \n\n![](/image3.jpg)这是一行中的图片![](/image4.jpg) \n接着文字\n还有一张![](/image5.jpg) \n最后一张![](/image6.jpg)""" expected1 = """这是一张图片\n这是另一张图片\n\n这是一行中的图片\n接着文字\n还有一张\n最后一张\n""" result1, urls1 = replace_images(test_s1) assert result1 == expected1, f"测试1失败: \n期望: {expected1}\n实际: {result1}" assert urls1 == ['/image1.jpg', '/image2.jpg', '/image3.jpg', '/image4.jpg', '/image5.jpg', '/image6.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls1}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s1)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result1)) print(f"\n验证测试1: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试1验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试用例2: 双换行结尾的特殊情况 test_s2 = """![](/test1.jpg)\n\n普通文本 \n\n![](/test2.jpg) \n单换行文本\n![](/test3.jpg)""" result2, urls2 = replace_images(test_s2) expected2 = """\n普通文本 \n\n\n单换行文本\n\n""" assert result2 == expected2, f"测试2失败: \n期望: {expected2}\n实际: {result2}" assert urls2 == ['/test1.jpg', '/test2.jpg', '/test3.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls2}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s2)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result2)) print(f"\n验证测试2: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试2验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试用例3: 复杂换行情况 test_s3 = """开始\n![](/img1.jpg)\n\n![](/img2.jpg)\n\n中间文字![](/img3.jpg)\n\n![](/img4.jpg) \n结尾""" result3, urls3 = replace_images(test_s3) expected3 = """开始\n\n\n中间文字\n\n结尾""" assert result3 == expected3, f"测试3失败: \n期望: {expected3}\n实际: {result3}" assert urls3 == ['/img1.jpg', '/img2.jpg', '/img3.jpg', '/img4.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls3}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s3)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result3)) print(f"\n验证测试3: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试3验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试用例4: 空的或不包含图片的情况 test_s4 = "没有图片的文本" result4, urls4 = replace_images(test_s4) assert result4 == test_s4, "测试4失败: 空图片测试" assert urls4 == [], "测试4失败: URL列表应该为空" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s4)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result4)) print(f"\n验证测试4: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试4验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试用例5: 图片后跟空格的情况 test_s5 = """图片1![](/pic1.jpg) 后面有空格\n图片2![](/pic2.jpg) 多个空格\n图片3![](/pic3.jpg)\t制表符""" result5, urls5 = replace_images(test_s5) expected5 = """图片1\n 后面有空格\n图片2\n 多个空格\n图片3\n\t制表符""" assert result5 == expected5, f"测试5失败: \n期望: {expected5}\n实际: {result5}" assert urls5 == ['/pic1.jpg', '/pic2.jpg', '/pic3.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls5}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s5)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result5)) print(f"\n验证测试5: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试5验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试6: 实际pdf mock test_s6 = """![](/d973b4c837af5a6bfb1445d7dc299f4f691d79dcf8bd497a22f0589dd3396d19.jpg)\n\n![](/c1eecb2872e2cdcb2d8e7fdbf4388baf00d968e7a02b6b6239604c907e01831c.jpg) \nFIGURE 4. Polarized transport of $![](/19149aadfc9d9722c8bd361c84271174f45213ec964a12941b6571b565cbdd3b.jpg) \nFig 4. RR of new-onset LBP ts (figures, tables) or in its entirety can be found online at: http://www.aappublications.org/site/misc/Permissions.xhtmlReprintsInformation about ordering reprints can be found online: http://www.aappublications.org/site/misc/reprints.xhtml\n\nAmerican Academy of Pediatrics\n\nDEDICATED TO THE HEALTH OF ALL CHILDREN\n\n![](/ae3bd9e4f876b4be80d072f19a18c1b882ce90eba491879da7df5399099fdc75.jpg)""" result6, urls6 = replace_images(test_s6) expected6 = """\n\nFIGURE 4. Polarized transport of $\nFig 4. RR of new-onset LBP ts (figures, tables) or in its entirety can be found online at: http://www.aappublications.org/site/misc/Permissions.xhtmlReprintsInformation about ordering reprints can be found online: http://www.aappublications.org/site/misc/reprints.xhtml\n\nAmerican Academy of Pediatrics\n\nDEDICATED TO THE HEALTH OF ALL CHILDREN\n\n\n""" assert result6 == expected6, f"测试6失败: \n期望: {expected6}\n实际: {result6}" assert urls6 == ['/d973b4c837af5a6bfb1445d7dc299f4f691d79dcf8bd497a22f0589dd3396d19.jpg', '/c1eecb2872e2cdcb2d8e7fdbf4388baf00d968e7a02b6b6239604c907e01831c.jpg', '/19149aadfc9d9722c8bd361c84271174f45213ec964a12941b6571b565cbdd3b.jpg', '/ae3bd9e4f876b4be80d072f19a18c1b882ce90eba491879da7df5399099fdc75.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls6}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s6)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result6)) print(f"\n验证测试6: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试6验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试7: 测试跳过icon和cover类型的图片 test_s7 = """这是一张图片![](/image1.jpg)\n\n这是icon![](/icon1.jpg) \n\n![](/cover1.jpg)这是cover![](/image2.jpg) \n接着文字""" rdd_files_dict7 = { "icon1.jpg": "icon", "cover1.jpg": "cover", "image1.jpg": "normal", "image2.jpg": "normal" } result7, urls7 = replace_images(test_s7, rdd_files_dict7) expected7 = """这是一张图片\n这是icon这是cover\n接着文字""" assert result7 == expected7, f"测试7失败: \n期望: {expected7}\n实际: {result7}" assert urls7 == ['/image1.jpg', '/image2.jpg'], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls7}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s7)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result7)) print(f"\n验证测试7: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试7验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" # 测试8: 测试全部都是icon/cover的情况 test_s8 = """![](/icon1.jpg)\n\n![](/cover1.jpg) \n![](/icon2.jpg)""" rdd_files_dict8 = { "icon1.jpg": "icon", "cover1.jpg": "cover", "icon2.jpg": "icon" } result8, urls8 = replace_images(test_s8, rdd_files_dict8) expected8 = """""" assert result8 == expected8, f"测试8失败: \n期望: {expected8}\n实际: {result8}" assert urls8 == [], f"URL列表不匹配: {urls8}" original_count = len(pattern_check.findall(test_s8)) result_count = len(pattern_check.findall(result8)) print(f"\n验证测试8: 原始有{original_count}个标记，替换后有{result_count}个标记") assert result_count == 0, f"测试8验证失败: 发现{result_count}个残留标记，不通过" print("所有测试通过!") # 运行测试 if __name__ == "__main__": test_replace_images() # 示例使用 s = """这是一些文本![](/example1.jpg)\n\n这是第二行\n![](/example3.jpg)\n\n单换行图片![](/example2.jpg)\n最后一张![](/example4.jpg)在行内""" result, urls = replace_images(s) print("\n示例输入:") print(repr(s)) print("\n替换结果:") print(repr(result)) print("\n提取的URL列表:") print(urls) # 示例使用带过滤的情况 print("\n" + "="*50) print("带过滤的示例:") s2 = """封面图![](/cover.jpg)\n\n正文图片![](/content1.jpg) \n图标![](/icon.jpg)内容图![](/content2.jpg)""" rdd_files_dict = { "cover.jpg": "cover", "icon.jpg": "icon", "content1.jpg": "figure", "content2.jpg": "figure" } result2, urls2 = replace_images(s2, rdd_files_dict) print("\n示例输入:") print(repr(s2)) print("\n替换结果:") print(repr(result2)) print("\n提取的URL列表:") print(urls2) ``` 主要修改： 1. **添加了 `rdd_files_dict` 参数**：函数现在接受一个可选的字典参数 2. **在 `repl` 函数中添加过滤逻辑**： - 提取文件名：`filename = url.split("/")[-1]` - 检查文件是否在字典中，且类型是否为 "icon" 或 "cover" - 如果满足条件，直接返回空字符串（既不添加到 urls 列表，也不替换为 `\n`） 3. **添加了新的测试用例**（测试7和测试8）来验证过滤功能 使用示例： ```python rdd_files_dict = { "icon.jpg": "icon", "cover.jpg": "cover", "normal.jpg": "figure" } result, urls = replace_images(text, rdd_files_dict) ```
